content.en:
Previously, although he was able to approach the rift, he could not enter the inside of the rift.

But at this moment, Ye Tian relied on his strong strength and the reincarnation of the vajra body to break into the depths of the rift.

Standing in front of the rift, he stepped in.

At this point, the power of the rules here is even more terrifying.

"You have to be fast, otherwise you won't last long!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Crash!

Ye Tianqiang walked into the inside of the rift, and as soon as he entered, he saw a fragment.

"Fragments, could it be the kind of fragments obtained by the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan?"

Due to the urgency of time, Ye Tian couldn't hold on for long, and directly grabbed this piece of fragment with one hand.

And just as he grabbed the fragment, a vision emerged from the darkness, it was a prison phantom.

But fleetingly, Ye Tian didn't know what it was.

"Let's get out of here!"

Ye Tian brought out this fragment, and then immediately came out of the Origin Ancestor Treasure Land World.

Soon.

Ye Tian left the Hurricane Sea, and then he breathed a sigh of relief.

"Got a piece back!"

Ye Tian carefully comprehended this fragment, there was an incomparably terrifying rule power on it, and it far surpassed the origin rules of the other side.

"Sure enough, it is a rule that surpasses the rules of the origin on the other side, it seems that the original origin ancestor broke through in half a step, and before the fall, it was indeed like the ancestor of the relent, tearing through the barrier of the land on the other side of eternity, obtaining fragments, and more than one fragment!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The strength of the Ancestor is definitely not as good as that of the Origin Ancestor, and there is even a big gap, so the Ancestor only cut out one fragment, while the Origin Ancestor obtained a lot of fragments.

And this news, the reincarnation of the heavenly clan, the reincarnation of the source clan, they don't know at all.

But even if you know, it's useless, the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords can't enter, and there is no way to come here, and the strength of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Eternal Beyond Land is too weak to enter the depths of the rift, otherwise they will be wiped out by this rule power.

It's just that Ye Tian's strength is too strong, and in terms of life preservation, it is not even inferior to the ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, so he can take away a fragment.

"There are so many rifts in the Origin Ancestor Treasure Land World, there must be more than one fragment!"

Ye Tian was going to get another fragment, but this replica body was seriously injured and couldn't hold out for too long, so he had to let other replica bodies in.

Soon.

Ye Tian's second replica body entered the Primordial Ancestral Treasure Land World and continued to search for a rift.

It didn't take long for a second rift to be found.

"Sure enough, there is also a fragment in this rift, which is a bit bigger than the previous fragment!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

As time passed, Ye Tian obtained more and more fragments.

"The Origin Ancestor has obtained so many fragments, he should have gone to that place in person, not just penetrated the reincarnation domain and dropped a fragment like the Ancestor of the Ancestors. "

As for what that place was, Ye Tian didn't know.

However, now that he has so many fragments, there is hope that he will understand this rule.

Perhaps once he understood this rule, he would know what that place was.

......

"Three Hundred and Twenty-Six Fragments !!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

The Reincarnation Celestial Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan fought to snatch a fragment, and he obtained so many fragments.

With his comprehension, he really hopes to comprehend this kind of rule, even if he comprehends a little skin, it is worth it!

this day.

Ye Tian came to the largest crack in the Origin Ancestor Treasure World, and just as he walked into the rift, a terrifying rule force descended, directly shattering his body.

"The copy body has fallen, and I can't get in!"

Ye Tian guessed that the fragments in this rift were very large, and the power contained in them was extremely terrifying, which he could not enter now.

Maybe he won't be able to enter there until he has broken through to the seventh balance realm.

After that, he searched again, but could not find any other fragments.

Moreover, he found that the rift that had lost the fragments was slowly being repaired.

Perhaps after many billions of primeval years, these rifts will disappear completely.

"So many fragments are enough, let's understand these fragments in the next few years!"

Ye Tian decided.

Tian Shan Pavilion.

Ye Tian took out a fragment and began to comprehend the rules above.

In order to be able to comprehend the above rules, he eats all the resources that help to improve his understanding, and he uses them to comprehend these rules.

Gradually, Ye Tian had a little understanding of this rule, but he was still too far from realizing it.

Time flies.

One primeval era after another passed, and Ye Tian also consumed one fragment after another.

"It's so hard to comprehend!"

Ye Tian also had to admit that this kind of rule was extremely difficult to comprehend, the key was that this kind of fragment only contained superficial rules, and it was too difficult to comprehend this kind of rule by relying on these fragments.

However, as long as Ye Tian is given enough time, there is still hope for comprehension.

Gradually, the long years passed.

300 million years later.

After such a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation has also improved a lot, although there is still a distance from the sixth balance limit, but he has also created several reincarnation supreme divine powers, and his strength has improved a lot.

Moreover, he was about to comprehend the rules of the Fragments.

this day.

Airplanes!!!!!

A powerful aura of rules that far surpassed the rules of the origin on the other side permeated from Ye Tian's body.

At the same time, under the influence of this rule power, his body underwent subtle changes, and even the origin was changing little by little.

"Finally understood!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Only after comprehending this rule did he know what it was.

【Zhidao】

Ye Tian didn't know the rules of the Supreme Dao, but this kind of rule far surpassed the rules of the origin of the other side, just comprehending the skin, only realizing a little trace of the Supreme Dao rules, he knew that his strength had greatly improved.

"I don't know if integrating the rules of the Supreme Dao into the supreme technique of reincarnation can exert a more powerful power?"

Ye Tian was ready to test it.

The ruins of reincarnation.

Ye Tian integrated the rules of the Supreme Dao into the Heavenly Spear of the Supreme Divine Power of Reincarnation.

In an instant, the power of this reincarnation supreme divine power skyrocketed.

Rumble!!!!

A single blow was struck, piercing the Endless Void.

"About 50% more power!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't underestimate this fifty percent power, to reach his realm and strength, it was extremely difficult to improve a little power, let alone fifty percent power.

Moreover, he only comprehended a little bit of the Supreme Dao Rules, if the realm of the Supreme Dao Rules was raised, then how terrifying his strength would be!
